services.heroTitle: 10 years optimizing processes, now powered by AI.
services.heroDesc: Our story doesn't start with the rise of generative AI; we've spent a decade eliminating operational friction in large organizations. AI is the engine we've integrated to make your company smarter and more profitable.
services.reinforcement: Our expertise is born from operational efficiency and evolves toward strategic intelligence.
services.philosophyLabel: TECHNOLOGY AT THE SERVICE OF PEOPLE
services.philosophyP1: We don't replace people, we empower their talent. We create Augmented Intelligence by combining human judgment with technological power.
services.philosophyP2: The result is Augmented Teams and multiplied results. Fewer manual tasks, more strategic impact. It's that simple.
services.clientsTitle: Companies already simplifying their future with us.
services.ctaDesc: The risk isn't implementing AI—it's falling behind while your competition does.

about.heroDesc: We transform technological uncertainty into a measurable and structured competitive advantage. No complications. Making AI easy.
about.methodTitle: From zero to your AI Office. No complications.

01.title: START
01.subtitle: DIAGNOSIS
01.desc: AI opportunity map for your organization. We set up your AI Committee, identify your first high-impact use cases and design your first quarter roadmap. Concrete deliverable, informed decision.

02.title: AI OFFICE — FIRST SPRINT
02.subtitle: VALIDATION
02.desc: Real automations to test or deploy in the AI Office. Regular meetings, measurable objectives and automation with direct impact assessment on your bottom line. Tangible results in the first quarter.

03.title: AI OFFICE AS A SERVICE
03.subtitle: OPERATION
03.desc: Continuous professional management of your AI strategy. New use cases every quarter, automated processes in production and constant model evolution. Your external AI office, 100% operational from day one.

04.title: YOUR OWN AI OFFICE
04.subtitle: AUTONOMY
04.desc: We transfer methodology, knowledge and capabilities to your own team. Your AI office operates 100% autonomously and independently. Our goal is to make you grow, not stay forever.

about.diagnosisDesc: 85% of AI projects fail due to lack of methodology. We design the structure that guarantees real impact on your bottom line.

about.sprintDesc: Six pillars that transform uncertainty into a productive and measurable AI operating system.

S.title: Squads
S.desc: Specialized teams (squads) to ground real day-to-day use cases. Technology that adapts to your way of working.

P.title: Priorities
P.desc: The business decides and prioritizes what to change first. Always in the driver's seat. AI Office active from minute one.

R.title: Roadmap
R.desc: Clear roadmap and 'fast tracks' or short periods. You get used to automating processes from the first quarter.

I.title: Impact
I.desc: Training creates digital culture and automation brings efficiency. The balance between both is essential to move forward.

N.title: Numbers
N.desc: Measurable objectives and ROI (OPEX and CAPEX). Total clarity and objectivity.

T.title: Trust
T.desc: Governance, ethics and security from the start to ensure your information integrity.

avisoLegal.s2Content: This Legal Notice governs access to and use of the SkyView Iberia, S.L. website. Access to the site implies acceptance of these conditions. SkyView Iberia, S.L. reserves the right to update them when necessary due to regulatory or strategic changes, always publishing the date of the last revision.
avisoLegal.s3Intro: SkyView Iberia, S.L. holds all intellectual and industrial property rights over this website, including:

avisoLegal.s3Item2: Texts, logos, trademarks and slogans, including "Making AI easy".
avisoLegal.s3Item3: Proprietary methodologies described on the site, such as the SPRINT Methodology and the AI Office model.
avisoLegal.s3Closing: Reproduction, distribution or transformation of any content without express written authorization from SkyView Iberia, S.L. is prohibited.
avisoLegal.s4Intro: SkyView keeps the content of this site updated with maximum rigor. However:
avisoLegal.s4Item1: Published content is informational and does not constitute a binding diagnosis. Any strategic recommendation requires a prior personalized audit.
avisoLegal.s4Item2: Given the speed of evolution in the AI sector, some content may become outdated between revisions. Always check the date of last update.
avisoLegal.s4Item3: SkyView is not responsible for technical interruptions of the web service resulting from maintenance or force majeure.
avisoLegal.s4Item4: Results described in use cases are illustrative of the technology's potential. Specific results depend on the context, processes and implementation of each organization.
avisoLegal.s5Content: This website may use technical cookies necessary for its operation and, with your prior consent, analytical cookies to understand how the site is used and improve the experience. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time from the consent banner or your browser settings. For more information, see our Cookie Policy.
avisoLegal.s6Content: The site may include links to third-party websites (technology partners such as OpenAI, Microsoft, Google or Anthropic). SkyView assumes no responsibility for the content, availability or privacy policies of external sites.
avisoLegal.s7Content: The processing of personal data you provide through this site is governed by our
avisoLegal.s7ContentAfter: , available on this same site, in accordance with GDPR (EU) 2016/679 and Spanish LOPDGDD 3/2018.
avisoLegal.s8Content: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from access to or use of this website, both parties expressly submit to the Courts and Tribunals of Madrid, waiving any other jurisdiction.

privacidad.label: LEGAL
privacidad.title: Privacy Policy and Data Protection
privacidad.intro: At SkyView, privacy isn't bureaucracy: it's part of how we work. This document explains, without circumlocution, what data we process, why, and what rights you have over it.
privacidad.toc2: 2. What data we process and for what purpose
privacidad.toc4: 4. Disclosure to third parties and international transfers
privacidad.toc5: 5. Security and confidentiality in AI projects
privacidad.s1Intro: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 (LOPDGDD), the data controller is:
privacidad.s1Domicilio: C/ Gemma Mengual, 2 — 28760 Tres Cantos, Madrid, Spain
privacidad.s2Title: 2. What data we process and for what purpose
privacidad.s2Intro: We only process data that you actively provide to us, for the following purposes:
privacidad.s2Row1Finalidad: Management of information requests and strategic sessions
privacidad.s2Row4Finalidad: Compliance with tax and accounting obligations
privacidad.s2Closing: We do not process special categories of data nor make automated decisions with legal impact on users.
privacidad.s3Intro: Data will be retained for as long as necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected, with the following criteria:
privacidad.s3ContactDesc: Up to 2 years from the last contact, unless the right of erasure is exercised.
privacidad.s3ContractDesc: 6 years, in compliance with the tax obligations established by Spanish regulations.
privacidad.s3Closing: After these periods, data will be deleted or irreversibly anonymized.
privacidad.s4Title: 4. Disclosure to third parties and international transfers
privacidad.s4Intro: Your data is not sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes. It may be disclosed to the following Data Processors, always under contractual agreements ensuring GDPR compliance:
privacidad.s4EEEItem: Cloud infrastructure providers with data centers in Europe (Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud — EU regions).
privacidad.s4IntlItem: Language model providers such as OpenAI (USA) and Anthropic (USA). These transfers are covered by Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission (Implementing Decision 2021/914) and the use of enterprise APIs whose terms of service guarantee that data is not used for training public models. You can review the specific safeguards on each provider's enterprise privacy pages.
privacidad.s5Title: 5. Security and confidentiality in AI projects
privacidad.s5Intro: SkyView works exclusively with enterprise APIs and private AI environments. This contractually implies, with our technology providers, that:
privacidad.s5Item1: Your session and project data is not used to train third-party public models.
privacidad.s5Item2: All access to sensitive Client information is managed under the confidentiality protocols established in the signed SOW.
privacidad.s5Closing: We implement technical and organizational measures consistent with the current state of the art to protect the integrity and confidentiality of data.
privacidad.s6Content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, limit or object to the processing of your data, as well as data portability. To exercise them, write to us at
privacidad.s6ContentAfter: indicating the right you wish to exercise and attaching a copy of your ID or equivalent document. We will respond within a maximum of 30 business days.
privacidad.s7Content: If you consider that the processing of your data does not comply with regulations, you can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency at

sow.label: LEGAL DOCUMENT
sow.title: Statement of Work
sow.subtitle: SkyView Iberia, S.L.
sow.metaPreparedForAfter: (as defined in the corresponding Purchase Order)
sow.s1P1: This document defines the framework, objectives and scope of the strategic AI consulting services that SkyView Iberia, S.L. will provide to the Client.
sow.s1P2: Our goal is clear: help you integrate AI into your real operations, not an eternal pilot. We transform technological complexity into actionable decisions that directly impact your EBIT.
sow.s1P3: This SOW establishes what is done, who does it, when and under what conditions. No unnecessary fine print; with all the clarity that a high-level professional relationship requires.
sow.s2s1P1: The market doesn't wait. AI has moved beyond being a trend to become a structural competitive advantage. The Client is at a tipping point: they have surpassed the phase of technological curiosity and need to move to impactful execution.
sow.s2s1P2: In our prior conversations we have identified specific needs that this project will address:
sow.s2s1Item1: Critical training: Train the Client's teams so they understand, evaluate and use AI tools with judgment and autonomy.
sow.s2s1Item2: Identifying efficiency levers: Detect which internal processes generate the most friction and have the greatest potential for improvement through intelligent automation.
sow.s2s1Item3: Workflow design and implementation: Build and deploy specific agents and automations, adapted to the Client's operational context.
sow.s2s1Item4: Reducing technological risk: Support the executive team in making technology investment decisions based on evidence, not speculation.
sow.s2s2P1: Upon completion of the scope defined in this SOW, the Client will have achieved:
sow.s2s2Item1: A clear diagnosis of their AI maturity and highest-impact vectors.
sow.s2s2Item2: An internal team with the judgment to evaluate, adopt and scale AI solutions.
sow.s2s2Item3: At least one critical process automated and in production.
sow.s2s2Item4: A basic governance model for AI adoption: who decides, who validates, who executes.
sow.s3Intro: SkyView's working model is structured in three progressive phases. Each phase has defined deliverables, established duration and clear closure criteria.
sow.s3StartP1: The START Phase is the starting point of any SkyView project. In two intensive weeks, we audit your operations, identify the highest-return opportunities and deliver an executable roadmap. We don't make generic PowerPoints; we do real diagnostics on your company.
sow.s3StartWeek1: Week 1 — Audit and interviews: Working sessions with key leaders from the defined impact areas (Operations, Finance, Sales, HR or others per PO). Analysis of current processes, tools in use and existing data flows.
sow.s3StartWeek2: Week 2 — Diagnosis and prioritization: Delivery of the AI Maturity Report with an opportunity map prioritized by impact/effort, initial tool recommendations and a 90-day roadmap.
sow.s3StartDel2: Critical Process Map with automation potential
sow.s3StartDel4: Presentation and validation session with the executive team
sow.s3StartClose: Closure condition: The START Phase is considered complete when the Client has received and validated the Diagnosis Report in the joint presentation session.
sow.s3SprintDuration: Duration: One or more quarters (90 days per sprint), per Purchase Order
sow.s3SprintP1: The SPRINT Phase is where real transformation happens. Each 90-day sprint has a concrete objective, measurable deliverables and biweekly review sprints to ensure constant alignment with the business.
sow.s3SprintMonth1: Month 1 — Design and build: Solution architecture, tool selection, workflow and automation development. Test environment configuration.
sow.s3SprintMonth2: Month 2 — Testing and refinement: Testing in a controlled environment with key users. Improvement iterations based on real feedback from the internal team.
sow.s3SprintMonth3: Month 3 — Deployment and stabilization: Production rollout, team training on solution usage, operational documentation and KPI tracking dashboard.
sow.s3SprintReview1: Biweekly check-in (30 min): Progress tracking and blocker resolution.
sow.s3SprintReview2: Monthly review (60 min): Metrics presentation and priority adjustment.
sow.s3SprintReview3: Sprint closure (90 days): Executive presentation of results and measured impact.
sow.s3SprintDel1: AI solution deployed in production (automation, agent or integration, per scope)
sow.s3SprintDel3: KPI dashboard associated with the implemented solution
sow.s3SprintDel4: Impact report: time saved, cost reduced, errors eliminated
sow.s3SprintClose: Sprint closure condition: The sprint is considered complete when the solution is in production and the Client has validated the impact report in the closing session.
sow.s3OfficeDuration: Mode: Monthly retainer (conditions per specific Purchase Order)
sow.s3OfficeP1: The AI Office is the relationship model for clients who want to maintain continuous evolution of their AI capabilities without needing to manage an internal team. It works as a strategic extension of the Client's executive team.
sow.s3OfficeItem1: Direct access to SkyView's senior team for consultations, technology decisions and evaluation of new tools.
sow.s3OfficeItem2: Maintenance and evolution of solutions implemented in previous phases.
sow.s3OfficeItem3: Continuous technology watch: we alert you when something relevant to your sector emerges and has real practical application.
sow.s3OfficeItem4: Ongoing team training: monthly update sessions to maintain internal capabilities.
sow.s3OfficeItem5: Support in evaluating vendors and new technology investments.
sow.s3OfficeItem6: Quarterly AI maturity and KPI evolution reports.
sow.s3OfficeClose: Access condition: The AI Office is available for Clients who have completed at least one START Phase or one SPRINT Phase with SkyView.
sow.s4Intro: Specific deliverables for each project are detailed in the corresponding Purchase Order (PO). In general, the standard deliverables per phase are as follows:
sow.s4Row1Del: AI Diagnosis Report, Process Map, 90-day Roadmap
sow.s4Row2Del: Solution in production, Documentation, KPI Dashboard, Impact Report
sow.s4Row3Del: Quarterly reports, Ongoing support, Monthly training
sow.s4P1: All deliverables will be provided in digital format. Strategic documents will be delivered in editable formats (PDF and/or DOCX). Technical configurations will be made directly on the Client's platforms or in environments defined in the PO.
sow.s4P2: SkyView commits to delivering agreed results with quality standards befitting a boutique strategic consultancy. Should a deliverable not meet agreed quality criteria, SkyView will make necessary revisions at no additional cost.
sow.s5Intro: The following matrix defines the responsibilities of each party in key project activities. Its proper application is essential to ensure agility in decision-making and avoid operational blockers.
sow.s5Close: Fundamental principle: SkyView is responsible for consulting, design and implementation. The Client is responsible for validation, final approval and operational oversight of everything that goes into production in their organization.
sow.s6s1P1: SkyView's fees are structured with the following payment scheme:
sow.s6s1Item1: 70% upon signing the Purchase Order (PO): The project begins once this payment is received. This is the condition for starting any phase.
sow.s6s1Item2: 30% upon delivery and validation of phase closure deliverables: Will be invoiced once the Client has received and accepted the final deliverables of the corresponding phase.
sow.s6s1P2: Specific amounts for each phase or service are detailed in the corresponding Purchase Order.
sow.s6s2Callout: Important: SkyView works with the best tools on the market: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, among others. Licenses, subscriptions and API costs of these platforms are not included in SkyView's fees and are entirely the Client's responsibility.
sow.s6s2P1: The Client will contract and pay each provider directly. SkyView will under no circumstances act as a financial intermediary with software providers. This model ensures the Client maintains the direct relationship, data ownership and full control over their platform accounts.
sow.s6s3P1: If project development requires travel, accommodation or other directly attributable expenses, these will be invoiced to the Client at actual cost, with prior written approval.
sow.s6s4Item1: Invoices will be issued in euros.
sow.s6s4Item2: Payment term is 15 calendar days from the invoice date.
sow.s6s4Item3: Late payment may result in suspension of services until regularization, without generating any liability for SkyView for resulting delays.
sow.s7s1P1: Once full payment of fees for a phase is completed, the Client acquires full ownership of the specific deliverables of that project: reports, strategic documents and configurations made directly on the Client's accounts and systems.
sow.s7s2P1: SkyView retains at all times the intellectual property of its methodologies, frameworks, proprietary processes, templates, analysis models and any tool or knowledge developed prior to or independently from the project.
sow.s7s2P2: Delivery of results to the Client does not in any case imply transfer of SkyView's methodology or any of its proprietary components.
sow.s7s3P1: The Client may use the deliverables for internal purposes without restriction. They may not commercialize, transfer to third parties or use them to provide consulting services without SkyView's express written consent.
sow.s8Intro: Both parties commit to maintaining the strictest confidentiality regarding all sensitive information accessed during project development.
sow.s8s1P1: This obligation covers all technical, strategic, financial, commercial or operational information exchanged between the parties, regardless of the medium in which it is provided.
sow.s8s2P1: The confidentiality obligation does not apply to information that:
sow.s8s2Item1: Is in the public domain at the time of disclosure or becomes so without breach of this agreement.
sow.s8s2Item2: Was known by the receiving party prior to its disclosure.
sow.s8s2Item3: Is required by legal mandate or final court order, in which case the other party will be informed with maximum advance notice.
sow.s8s3P1: This confidentiality obligation remains in force during the term of the contract and for a period of two (2) years after its termination, regardless of the reason for termination.
sow.s9Intro: At SkyView we take transparency to the maximum. Before working with us, you should know this about AI.
sow.s9s1Callout: Critical Clause: Artificial intelligence models (such as GPT-4, Claude, Gemini or others) are probabilistic systems. This means they generate responses based on statistical patterns, not absolute certainties. They can generate inaccurate, incomplete or outdated information (what the industry calls "hallucinations"). Their results may vary between similar queries. They do not replace professional human judgment in high-impact decisions.
sow.s9s2P1: SkyView assumes no responsibility for results generated directly by third-party AI models, nor for decisions the Client makes based on such results without corresponding human validation. This limitation applies to both models used during the project and those deployed in production after its completion.
sow.s9s3P1: SkyView designs all its workflows with integrated quality, validation and human supervision criteria. We actively recommend that the Client:
sow.s9s3Item1: Never fully autonomously automate high-impact processes (financial, legal, security or personnel) without human review.
sow.s9s3Item2: Establish periodic audit and review mechanisms for AI system outputs in production.
sow.s9s3Item3: Train their team to identify and manage errors generated by AI models.
sow.s10Callout: SkyView applies the Human-in-the-Loop principle as standard in all its projects.
sow.s10s1P1: The Client is the ultimate responsible party for validating and authorizing any AI solution, automation or agent before its production deployment and commercial use. This validation must be performed in the test environment established during the corresponding phase.
sow.s10s1P2: No system developed by SkyView will enter production without the Client's explicit approval.
sow.s10s2P1: Once the Client approves production deployment, operational responsibility for implemented systems lies with the Client. SkyView may provide technical support per AI Office conditions or a separately agreed maintenance service, but will not assume responsibility for system operation in production environments under the Client's management.
sow.s10s3P1: For project development, the Client will provide SkyView with necessary access to their platforms, tools and relevant data. SkyView will use these accesses exclusively for project purposes and will revoke or return them when the project concludes.
sow.s11Intro: AI projects evolve. We know the scope may need adjusting. We manage it with a clear process.
sow.s11s1P1: Scope changes (not included in the original SOW) are requests for:
sow.s11s1Item1: New functionalities, automations or integrations not contemplated in the PO.
sow.s11s1Item2: Expansion of the number of departments, users or covered processes.
sow.s11s1Item3: Substantial modifications to already agreed deliverables once their elaboration has begun.
sow.s11s1Item4: Additional work derived from changes in the Client's systems, data or priorities during the project.
sow.s11s2Item1: The Client or SkyView identifies the need for a change.
sow.s11s2Item2: SkyView prepares an additional scope proposal with impact estimation on time and cost.
sow.s11s2Item3: The Client approves the proposal in writing (email with explicit confirmation or additional Purchase Order).
sow.s11s2Item4: Additional work begins only after written approval.
sow.s11s2Close: No scope change will be considered accepted or executed without prior written approval. Verbal instructions or informal conversations have no contractual validity for scope modification purposes.
sow.s12P1: The relationship between SkyView and the Client is a commercial relationship between independent parties.
sow.s12P2: SkyView operates with full technical and methodological autonomy in service delivery. Nothing in this SOW implies the existence of an employment, agency, partnership or representation relationship between SkyView and the Client, nor between the Client and SkyView team professionals.
sow.s12P3: SkyView may subcontract part of the services to specialized professionals, maintaining in all cases responsibility to the Client for agreed results.
sow.s13s1P1: This SOW becomes effective on the date of signing the corresponding Purchase Order and remains in force until completion and delivery of all agreed deliverables, unless terminated early.
sow.s13s2P1: Both parties may agree to early termination of the contract by written notice with a minimum of 30 calendar days advance notice.
sow.s13s3P1: Either party may terminate the contract in case of material breach of obligations by the other party, if such breach is not remedied within 15 business days of written notification.
sow.s13s4Item1: The Client will pay fees corresponding to work actually performed up to the termination date, calculated proportionally.
sow.s13s4Item2: SkyView will deliver to the Client the progress and materials produced up to that point.
sow.s13s4Item3: Confidentiality obligations and intellectual property limitations will remain in force as established in this document.
sow.s14P1: This SOW is governed by Spanish law.
sow.s14P2: For any dispute, claim or litigation arising from the interpretation, execution or breach of this document, both parties expressly submit to the jurisdiction of the Courts and Tribunals of Madrid, waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.
sow.footerCompany: SkyView Iberia, S.L. — Making AI easy
sow.footerMeta: Madrid, Spain | Document ID: SOW-IA-MASTER-v0.2 | Version 0.2 — 23/02/2025
sow.footerNote: Usage note: This document has legal validity once the corresponding Purchase Order (PO) has been signed by both parties. In case of discrepancy between this SOW and the specific PO, the PO content will prevail. For any questions about this document, contact SkyView through the official channels indicated on the website.

blogPage.title: INSIGHTS
blogPage.subtitle: Exploring the intersection of architecture, design, and human experience through thoughtful analysis and contemporary perspectives.
blogPage.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest insights on architecture and design

amura.desc: AI Office for the People & Culture department. Segmenting the employee "journey": selection, onboarding, training, development... and progressively automating tasks across all processes.

bbraun.desc: Automation of repetitive tasks in factory data management and automatic transfer to AS400. ROI: 70% annual savings in time and cost.

caritas.desc: START and SPRINT to establish AI best practices. AI Committee from day one. Final goal at 18 months: AI Office.

codorniu.desc: Automation of repetitive tasks in financial processes. Efficiency delivering 72% savings in time and cost. Calculated by the client.

desigual.desc: Automation of repetitive tasks in financial processes. 65% savings in time and cost. ROI calculated by Financial Controlling.

diafarm.desc: B2B SaaS solution for the finance department with efficiencies exceeding 50%, calculated by the finance department itself.

euskaltel.desc: AI Office as a service focused on governance and scalability of operational processes.

hm.desc: Digitization of simplified invoices certified by AEAT. 80% process automation with automatic ERP upload.

globalia.desc: Automation of claims processing (paper and email). Metadata extraction and upload to central systems.

infojobs.desc: Automation of repetitive tasks in financial processes. Time savings and efficiency improvement exceeding 60%.
